title: Brave at Bedtime
lesson: The dark isn't scary when you feel cozy and safe; you can be brave.
prompts: In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits up on the bed hugging the teddy bear, looking a little unsure about the dark. Medium shot at eye level, a soft warm glow fills the room, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits in the mid-ground on the bed, with a slightly worried expression, still hugging the teddy bear. In the foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} kneels beside the bed reaching toward a small night-light, smiling warmly and reassuringly. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. If a prop is shared, show one shared prop linking their hands in one common space. Eye-level medium-wide shot, gentle warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the bed, with a calmer expression, hugging the teddy bear. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} leans in tucking a soft blanket around them, smiling gently. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. If a prop is shared, show one shared prop linking their hands in one common space. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image rests peacefully alone on the pillow with the teddy bear tucked close and a content, peaceful expression, no longer afraid of the dark. Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening, the child sits up on the bed hugging a teddy bear, looking unsure about the dark, in a soft warm glow.
In the evening bedroom, the child sits on the bed hugging the teddy, a little worried, while the father kneels reaching toward a small night-light to switch it on.
In the bedroom now softly lit by the night-light, the child sits on the bed calmer, hugging the teddy, while the father leans in tucking a blanket around them.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child lies back alone on the pillow with the teddy beside them, calmer now.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child snuggles down alone under the blanket hugging the teddy with a small brave smile.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child rests peacefully alone on the pillow with the teddy close, content and no longer afraid of the dark.
texts: It was bedtime. {NAME} sat up in bed hugging a teddy, feeling unsure about the dark. "It's so dark in here," {NAME} whispered.
"I'm a little bit scared," said {NAME}. Dad knelt down. "Let's switch on your night-light," he said softly, and click — on it glowed.
The room filled with a warm, cosy glow. "That's better, isn't it?" said Dad, tucking the blanket in snug. "Much better," said {NAME}.
{NAME} lay back on the soft pillow with teddy close by. "The dark isn't so scary now," {NAME} said quietly.
{NAME} snuggled down and gave a brave little smile. "I can be brave," {NAME} whispered to teddy.
Soon {NAME} rested, calm and cosy, not afraid at all. "Goodnight," murmured {NAME}. Safe and snug, {NAME} was brave.
